title: Video by uoasportsagility
description:
This drill builds the foundation most athletes skip, lateral power, ankle stiffness, and controlled footwork under speed. When athletes can move side to side without losing balance or wasting steps, their cuts get sharper, reactions get faster, and they stop getting beat on first movement. This is how you train real game speed, own the ground, stay efficient, and execute with control every rep. Perform 3x10 seconds.

DM FAST for the complete youth speed program.

#speedtraining #agilitytraining #firststep #youthathletes #explosiveness
uploader: Coach Tracy Green, PhD | Speed & Performance Coach
